title: Global X U.S. Electrification ETF (ZAP) stock price, news, quote and history
full_text: This article provides financial information for the Global X U.S. Electrification ETF (ZAP), including its stock price, news, and historical data. As of April 2nd, 2026, ZAP was trading at $32.60, with a slight increase in after-hours trading. The ETF has shown positive trailing returns, significantly outperforming its category over a 1-year period.
